infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: DiaGe uses your photo library to attach images of jewelry pieces, receipts, and warranty documents.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: DiaGe uses your camera to photograph jewelry pieces and paperwork for your vault.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationUsageDescription: DiaGe sends reminders for jewelry inspections and warranty renewals.

web.name: DiaGe — Jewelry Organizer
web.description: DiaGe helps you track your jewelry collection, manage a wishlist, and set inspection reminders — all in one place.

plugins.photosPermission: DiaGe uses your photo library to attach images of jewelry pieces, receipts, and warranty documents.
plugins.cameraPermission: DiaGe uses your camera to photograph jewelry pieces and paperwork for your vault.
DiaGe uses your camera to scan retailer QR codes and sync jewelry catalogs to your wishlist.
